sentinel-cognitive-profiler.description: Cognitive Load Profiler — Assesses driver cognitive/emotional state before trips via AI-driven conversation

sentinel-route-risk.description: Route Risk Scorer — Analyses planned routes and assigns per-segment risk scores using OSM, weather, and NCRB data

sentinel-crash-recorder.description: Crash Context Recorder — Captures and documents incident context with cryptographic timestamping

sentinel-witness-ai.description: Witness Statement AI — Processes raw witness accounts into legally structured statements

sentinel-legal-doc.description: Legal Document AI — Generates FIR drafts, insurance claim letters, and rights explainers

sentinel-recovery-coach.description: Psychological Recovery Coach — 30-day post-accident check-in program with PHQ-9/PCL-5 screening
